workplan: Ingest business data, search live web for competitors and trends, extract anomalies.
reasoning: Diye gaye data sources (CSV sales data, PDF business report, news, social posts, web URL, live competitor data, aur live Pakistan trend) ka gehrai se jaiza liya gaya hai. Is tajziye mein, sab se pehle, sales data mein maujood stock ki kami aur high demand wale products ke darmiyan numaya faraq ko ek badi anomaly ke taur par pehchana gaya hai. Khaas taur par ice cream tubs aur cold cakes ki demand garmi ki wajah se bohot barh gayi hai, jiska zikr news aur social media par bhi hai. Dusra, business report ki marketing strategy (high-margin items ko push karna) aur sales data mein unhi items ke kam stock ke darmiyan ek wazeh contradiction dekhi gayi hai. Is contradiction ko hal karne ke liye stock management aur marketing strategy mein behtar taal mel ki zaroorat hai. Har source ki credibility ka andaza lagaya gaya hai, jismein internal data ko zyada bharose mand mana gaya hai. Temporal trends mein, raat ke waqt thandi desserts ki demand mein izafa aur garmi ke mausam mein cooling products ki aam talab ko numaya kiya gaya hai. Competitor analysis mein, mukhalif brands ki discount aur free delivery offers ko samjha gaya hai. Aakhir mein, live Pakistan trend ko istemal karte hue, garmi ko ek masle ke taur par pesh karne aur uske hal ke taur par apne products ko promote karne ki strategy tajweez ki gayi hai. Kul mila kar, data is baat ki taraf ishara karta hai ke company ko apni inventory management ko behtar banana chahiye, khaas taur par un products ke liye jin ki demand garmi ki wajah se bohot barh gayi hai, aur apni marketing strategies ko is badalte hue market trend ke mutabiq adjust karna chahiye.
decision: Company ko apni inventory management ko fauri taur par behtar banana chahiye, khaas taur par 'Mango IceCream_1L', 'Pista_Kulfi_Tubs', aur 'Lotus_Cheesecake_Cake' jaise products ke liye jin ka stock bohot kam hai aur demand bohot zyada hai. Marketing team ko apni campaigns ko stock ki maujoodgi ke mutabiq adjust karna chahiye aur raat ke waqt ki barhti hui demand ko target karna chahiye. Competitors ki offers (discount aur free delivery) ko dekhte hue, apni pricing aur delivery strategies par bhi gaur karna chahiye. Garmi ke mausam ko ek mauqe ke taur par istemal karte hue, thandi desserts ko 'garmi ka hal' ke taur par promote karna chahiye.
output_summary: Found insights and integrated live trends.

workplan: Generate action chain, verify budget constraints, and predict ROI.
reasoning: Chai cafe summer transition requires moving focus to cold beverages and late evening family discounts to counter daylight temperature drop-off.
decision: Proposed highly custom actionable strategy covering specific product challenges and budget limits.
